subcategory: get-started call-to-action button with variant system
use_cases: Primary call-to-action for onboarding and sign-up flows
Trigger for navigation to registration or setup pages
Versatile button component for any SaaS application requiring user action
Accessible button with focus states for keyboard navigation support
Reusable button with multiple variants for different hierarchy levels
ai_summary: A customizable React button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features hover states, focus-visible rings for accessibility, and disabled states. Suitable as a primary call-to-action button for SaaS applications, landing pages, and onboarding flows requiring accessible, reusable button elements.
